raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current footing","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, Maria?","description":"Opens with a calm read on where her Principal work feels steady before any harder topics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rituals and energy","name":"What has changed for you in the team rituals lately?","description":"Surfaces whether the drop in participation is about the rituals themselves, the team dynamic, or something else.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next chapter","name":"What kind of impact do you want your work to have this year?","description":"Moves from vague ambition to the kind of contribution she wants to be known for.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring role","name":"What is mentoring doing for your growth right now?","description":"Tests whether the mentoring program is intentional development work or just adjacent activity.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Readout quality","name":"What kind of readout would actually answer your questions about last cycle?","description":"Gets specific about the feedback she wants, without assuming she wants the whole conversation reopened.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Missing signal","name":"What part of that decision still feels unresolved for you?","description":"Gently surfaces whether the passed-over decision is still carrying emotional or practical ambiguity.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"Where would you want more from me to move this forward?","description":"Finds the specific kind of manager support that would actually unblock her next step.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoffs now","name":"What would you need to stop doing to make room for the next step?","description":"Forces a real tradeoff between current commitments and future growth.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next move","name":"Given what we've covered, what do you want to take on first?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete choice for the next stretch.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
